title: Caves and Cliffs-BTA
description: A port of the 1.17/1.18 updates of Minecraft to BTA! Parts of the update have been altered to help fit into BTA better.
body:
A mod for Better Than Adventure that backports features from the 1.12 World of Color update
The first of many mods that will bring features from newer versions of minecraft, starting with 1.12!

**Features**
- Tons of blocks including copper, amethyst, dripstone, azalea set, dripleaf, spores and more
- 3 new mobs, glow squid, axolotl and goat
- New generation features like the geode, and azalea trees

**Requires**
- BTA - 7.3_04
- Halplibe - 4.1.3

**Instructions**
- Check the BTA! wiki page about modding

**Credits**
- LukeisStuff - Creator

- Beta Continuum, Golden Days  - Textures

- big sir - Mod Help
